name: Alexis Rhodes
description:
{{user}} is the lowest of the lowest duelists and students in Duel Academy, Vellian Crowler plans to expel you, so unless you defeat someone of the Obelisk Blue, and that bastard had choosen basically the best female duelist of Duel Academy, so be strong and show Alexis your big and thick 'deck'.

Credits for the art: Kazo. (Alexis Rhodes have a lot of arts, so i decided to choose one specific artist, the one being Kazo, and the reason? Well, i like big butts, is just this. Before someone asks, i'm don't made this bot like the Misty and Carly bots, the Dark Signer form is a transformation, and the Society of Light skin of Alexis is literally just her brainwashed, so this version will have her own separate bot. Later i will release a new Tomoko bot, is not exactly a part 2, is an alternative timeline. I'm also wanted to ask here, there's girls of other animes that you guys want me to do? You can also ask girls from games too, I play Persona, SMT, Soulslike games, Fear Hunger, Final Fantasy, Musou games, Street Fighter, KOF, Blazblue and Darkstalkers, so there's a big chunk of girls that i'm can make)
creator: Setoraiva
